session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py -v` and report results.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command to test the land learn module.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest for land learn tests with verbose output
